meta.ogSub: Browse apartments, lofts and houses across the city — book a tour in a tap.

home.title: Danapa — apartment renting in Da Nang
home.description: A calm, simple way to rent in Da Nang. Browse apartments across every district, book tours, and list your home.

apartments.title: Apartments for rent in Da Nang
apartments.description: Browse apartments, studios and houses for rent across Da Nang — filter by district, price, bedrooms and amenities.

detail.title: {title} — {district}
detail.description: {beds, plural, =0 {Studio} one {# bedroom} other {# bedrooms}} · {baths, plural, one {# bathroom} other {# bathrooms}} · {area} m² {type} for rent in {district}, {city} — {price}/month on Danapa.

owner.title: {name} — host on Danapa
owner.description: See the homes {name} is renting out on Danapa and book a tour.

landing.footer: Danapa — a demo prototype. No account required.

chooser.headline: Your next home starts here.
chooser.sub: Thousands of apartments across Da Nang. Choose how you'd like to begin.

roles.rentBlurb: Browse homes, find your next place.

stats.caption: Live across Da Nang · updated daily

showcase.districtsSub: Jump straight to the neighborhoods you're eyeing
showcase.trendingSub: The homes renters are watching most

signin.title: Welcome back
signin.subtitle: Sign in to manage your search and your listings.
signin.errorToast: Could not sign in. Try again.

signup.title: Create your account
signup.subtitle: Join Danapa in a minute — you can switch roles anytime.
signup.agree: I agree to Danapa's <terms>Terms</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.
signup.confirmToast: Account created — check your email to confirm.

forgot.title: Reset your password
forgot.subtitle: Enter the email tied to your account and we'll send you a link to set a new password.
forgot.sentLead: We sent a reset link to {email}. It expires in 30 minutes.
forgot.didntGet: Didn't get it? Check spam, or <resend>resend</resend>.

reset.title: Set a new password
reset.subtitle: Choose a new password for your account. You'll stay signed in.

brand.headline: Find a place, or fill one.
brand.lead: A quiet, honest way to rent in Da Nang — for the people looking, and the people listing.

errors.shellFooter: Danapa — apartment renting in Da Nang
errors.errorBody: An unexpected error stopped this page from loading. It's on our side — trying again usually fixes it.
errors.notFoundTitle: This place isn't on the map
errors.notFoundBody: The page you're looking for may have moved, or the address has a typo. Either way, there's nothing listed here.

profile.title: Manage profile
profile.aboutPlaceholder: A sentence or two about who you are and what you're looking for.

empty.title: No homes match those filters
empty.body: Try widening your price range or clearing a filter.

map.title: Where you'll be
map.approxNote: Exact address is shared once your tour is confirmed.
map.awayHint: Straight-line distance from your current location
map.routeSummary: {distance} · {minutes, plural, one {# min} other {# min}} drive

reviews.title: Reviews
reviews.emptyBody: This home's host hasn't been reviewed yet.

tours.descPick: Choose a day and time to tour {title}.
tours.descVerify: Confirm your details to send the request.
tours.descDone: Your tour request has been sent.
tours.selectDayHint: Select a highlighted day to see open tour times.
tours.notePlaceholder: Anything you'd like the owner to know?
tours.ownerWillRespond: The owner will accept, decline, or suggest another time.
tours.requestedBody: We've sent your request for <d>{date}</d> at <t>{time}</t>. The owner will confirm shortly — you'll get an email once they respond.
tours.bookError: Couldn't request the tour. Please try again.
tours.alreadyToast: You already have a tour for this home.
tours.alreadyHeading: You already have a tour here

alreadyState.reschedule: awaiting your reply on a new time

tours.alreadyBody: Your tour is <s>{state}</s> for <d>{date}</d> at <t>{time}</t>. To keep it simple for the owner, we allow one tour per home at a time — reschedule or cancel the current one first.

listingForm.newSubtitle: Add the details of your place. You can save it as a draft.
listingForm.saveError: Couldn't save your listing. Please try again.
listingForm.photosHint: Upload photos of your place. Drag to reorder — the first photo is used as the cover.
listingForm.title: Title
listingForm.titlePlaceholder: e.g. Sunlit studio near Mỹ Khê

photoUploader.uploadHint: PNG or JPG — add as many as you like

publish.editBlurb: Your edits go live as soon as you save.
publish.newBlurb: Publish to list it now, or keep it as a draft to finish later.

listings.emptyBody: Create a listing to start renting out your place.

tours.emptyBody: When renters request a viewing, they'll show up here for you to accept, decline, or reschedule.
tours.confirmedToastDesc: We let the renter know it's on.
tours.proposedToastDesc: The renter can accept or decline your suggestion.

availability.subtitle: Pick the times you're open to show your places. This repeats every week.
